vehicles.notes: Final year of R231 generation. SL-Class discontinued after 2020 until R232 in 2022.
SL55 AMG R230 was not sold in US until 2003 model year. 2001-2002 were Europe-only.
SL55 AMG R230 was not sold in US until 2003 model year. 2001-2002 were Europe-only.
First year SL55 AMG available in US market (R230)
R230 Facelift. SL55 replaced by SL63 with 6.2L V8.
Transition year - new R231 introduced mid-year
R231 Facelift. Naming changed to AMG SL63/SL65.
Final year R231 AMG. SL65 discontinued. SL63 discontinued after 2019.
All-new R232 generation. 2+2 seating. Production by AMG only (no non-AMG SL).
R232 generation. 2025 specs assumed to continue from 2024.
R172 - rebranded from SLK to SLC
R171 Facelift. SLK 280 renamed to SLK 300.
Final year R172. Rebranded to SLC for 2017.
SLK32 AMG not available in US until 2002 model year. Production started Jan 2001 in Germany, sold in US as 2002 MY.
SLK32 AMG not available in US until 2002 model year. 2001 was Europe-only.
First year SLK32 AMG in US market (R170)
New R171 generation. SLK55 AMG replaces SLK32 AMG.
Final year. Rebranded to AMG SLC 43 for 2017.
W203. C55 AMG replaces C32 AMG.
